title: orobanche californica subsp. feudgei
intro: Orobanche californica subsp. feudgei, also known as Feudge's broomrape, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the genus Orobanche, which consists of annual or biennial hemiparasitic plants. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orobanche californica subsp. feudgei include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
